issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (Blocker with optional activation during opponent's attack), not 'OnAttacked'. 'OnAttacked' fires automatically; this effect requires player choice ('You may').
Missing condition check: effect only resolves if you have 4+ Events in trash. Current DSL lacks 'TrashCount' condition gate before PowerBoost.
TrashFromHand action should not have a cardType filter. The effect allows trashing any 1 card from hand; the filter should be removed or set to null.
Missing 'limit' property for 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Should include 'limit:{type:"PerTurn",value:1}'.
